steps.title: Translate the question
steps.content: The question asks what percent of $300$ equals $75$. Use $$\text{percent}=\frac{\text{part}}{\text{whole}}\cdot 100$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A, $25\%$, gives $0.25(300)=75$. Correct.
  • Choice B, $50\%$, gives $150$.
  • Choice C, $75\%$, gives $225$.
  • Choice D, $225\%$, gives $675$.
That matches choice A.
